ABS ESP - X74ph2 J81ph1p/ph2 X73ph2 - version 14

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS-VDC - ABS-ESP

    "sentbytes": "31C100",
    "name": "Contrôle de denture - résultat",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Status - fin de comptage / résultat": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Nombre de dents": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "30822000",
    "name": "Pilotage en couple GMP",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Couple ASR à émettre": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Status de pilotage": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "30832000",
    "name": "Génération vitesse véhicule",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Vitesse véhicule à générer": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Status de pilotage": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "308420",
    "name": "Pilotage warning",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Status de pilotage": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 22,
    "sentbytes": "1200040000",
    "name": "Read Freeze Frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "FFN": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Défaut ayant été réhabilité": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Nombre d'apparition du défaut": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Odométrie premier défaut (Km)": {
        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "Odométrie dernier défaut (km)": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      },
      "Vitesse AVD": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Vitesse AVG": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Vitesse ARD": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Vitesse ARG": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Etat contact feux de stop": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "Déconnexion conducteur de l'ESP": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Régulateur REF": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Régulateur ABS": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Régulateur MSR": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Régulateur ASR": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Régulateur AYC": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Régulateur CSV sous virage": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Angle volant (FF)": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "Accélération transversale (FF)": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Vitesse de lacet (FF)": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Pression de freinage (FF)": {
        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "Tension d'alimentation (FF)": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310000",
    "name": "Contrôle de denture - choix de la roue",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },

      },

        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro MPR groupe seul": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "14FF00",

    "deny_sds": []

    "replybytes": "700000",

      },

        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },

      "Output Control Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "82",
    "name": "Stop diagnostic",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3E",
    "name": "Tester present",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 10,
    "sentbytes": "21B2",
    "name": "Lecture ECU diagnostiquables",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Topo / Schéma élec": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "INJECTION": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "ABS": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "TdB": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "UCH": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "AIRBAG": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "VERROU": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "CLIM": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "BVA": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "UCC": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "SYP": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "FPA": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "COSLAD": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "AAP Ligne K": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "CHAUDIERE": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "ACC": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Repet BVA": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "AAP Ligne CAN": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Kit main libre": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 2
      }
    }
  },

  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "81",
    "name": "Start diagnostic communication",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "SessionName": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 30,
    "sentbytes": "2182",
    "name": "Lecture Etat Bus CAN",
    "deny_sds": [],
